patterns: I want to know about different types of loans
responses: Sure! We offer Personal Loans, Professional Loans, and Business Loans. You can also inquire about EMIs and Average Bank Balance.

patterns: I am interested in a Personal Loan
responses: Great! To proceed with a Personal Loan, I'll need some information. Could you please provide your total salary?
Thanks! Please enter your total obligation.
Got it! Please select your bank from HDFC, ICICI, Kotak, Axis, Bajaj, TATA, Chola, L&T, Godrej, and YES bank.
Thanks! I will inform you in a minute.

patterns: I am interested in a Professional Loan
responses: Certainly! For a Professional Loan, I'll need to know your profession.
Thanks! Please enter the number of years of your professional experience.
Great! Do you have a CIBIL score? (yes or no)

patterns: I am interested in a Business Loan
responses: Sure thing! To proceed with a Business Loan, do you want to calculate the loan amount based on turnover, net profit, or gross profit?
Great! Please enter your turnover.
Thanks! Please enter your obligation for the turnover (monthly/yearly).
Thanks!I will inform you in a minute

patterns: On the basis of net profit
responses: Sure! Please enter your net profit.

patterns: my net profit of business is {number}
responses: Thanks! Please enter your obligation for the net profit (monthly/yearly).
Thanks!I will inform you in a minute

patterns: On the basis of gross profit
responses: Certainly! Please enter your gross profit.
Thanks! Please enter your obligation for the gross profit (monthly/yearly).
Thanks!I will inform you in a minute
Certainly! To calculate EMIs, I'll need the loan amount.
Thanks! Please enter the interest rate.
Great! Please enter the loan tenor.
Thanks!I will let you know in a minute

patterns: Tell me about Average Bank Balance
How is average bank balance calculated?
responses: Sure! To calculate the Average Bank Balance, I'll need the amount you have in your account on 5th dates.
Thanks! Please enter the balance you have on the 10th of the month.
Got it! Please enter the balance you have on the 15th of the month.
Thanks! Please enter the balance you have on the 20th of the month.
Sure! Please enter the balance you have on the 25th of the month.
Sure! Please enter the balance you have on the 30th of the month.
Got it!I will tell you in a minute.
